Best for: web search, code execution, dynamic tasks." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="412" x="44" y="202" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f3e8ff;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=6;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="215" width="510" x="490" y="68" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#5b2a8c;" value="2 · Reflexion Pattern" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="260" x="504" y="76" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rf-actor" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="Actor (LLM)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="105" x="508" y="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rf-eval" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="Evaluator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="105" x="683" y="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rf-reflect" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="Self-Reflection" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="105" x="858" y="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rf-mem" parent="1" style="cylinder;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Episodic Memory" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="135" x="658" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rf-desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;verticalAlign=top;" value="Verbal reinforcement: Actor → Evaluator scores → Self-Reflection critiques → stored in Episodic Memory → Actor improves next attempt. Achieved 91% pass@1 on HumanEval." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="472" x="504" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rf-e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="rf-actor" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="rf-eval" value="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rf-e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="rf-eval" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="rf-reflect" value="score"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rf-e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="rf-reflect" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#00508a;" value="3 · Plan-and-Execute Pattern" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="300" x="44" y="313" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-planner" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Planner (LLM)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="110" x="58" y="358" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-steps" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Step 1<br/>Step 2<br/>Step 3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="57" width="80" x="228" y="352" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-exec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Executor (Tools)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="80" x="368" y="358" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="pe-planner" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pe-steps" value="makes plan"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="pe-steps" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pe-exec" value="execute"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-replan" edge="1" parent="1" source="pe-exec" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pe-planner" value="re-plan (optional)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="408" y="425" /> <mxPoint x="113" y="425" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;verticalAlign=top;" value="Separates planning from execution. Planner decomposes the goal into ordered steps; Executor runs them sequentially. Optional re-planning when results deviate. Best for: structured multi-step tasks." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="412" x="44" y="444" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8f8e8;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=6;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="225" width="510" x="490" y="305" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a6b1a;" value="4 · Tree of Thoughts (ToT)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="300" x="504" y="313" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-root" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Root Thought" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="38" width="110" x="685" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-b1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Branch A" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="88" x="510" y="398" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-b2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Branch B" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="88" x="696" y="398" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-b3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Branch C" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="88" x="882" y="398" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-l1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="✗ dead end" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="88" x="510" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-l2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="✓ solution" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="88" x="696" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-l3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" value="? evaluate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="88" x="882" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;verticalAlign=top;" value="BFS/DFS search over a tree of intermediate reasoning steps. LLM generates & evaluates each branch. Enables backtracking when a path fails. Best for: math, logic, planning problems." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="472" x="504" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="tot-root" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="tot-b1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="tot-root" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="tot-b2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="tot-root" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="tot-b3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="tot-b1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="tot-l1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="tot-b2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="tot-l2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tot-e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="tot-b3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;" target="tot-l3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: Separates planning from execution. Planner decomposes the goal into ordered steps; Executor runs them sequentially. Optional re-planning when results deviate. Best for: structured multi-step tasks.

div.div: BFS/DFS search over a tree of intermediate reasoning steps. LLM generates & evaluates each branch. Enables backtracking when a path fails. Best for: math, logic, planning problems.
